fields.Plan Name: SEH Select Gold EPO AmeriHealth Advantage RP with NY $20/$40
fields.In-Network Generic RX: Retail/Mail Order (1-30 days supply) $20/Fill. Mail Order (31-90 days supply) $40/Fill. Deductible does not apply.
fields.In-Network Tier 4 RX: Retail/Mail Order (1-30 days supply) $75/Fill. Mail Order (31-90 days supply) $150/Fill. Deductible does not apply.
fields.Deductible Explanation: Generally, you must pay all of the costs from providers up to the deductible amount before this plan begins to pay. If you have other family members on the plan, each family member must meet their own individual deductible until the total amount of deductible expenses paid by all family members meets the overall family deductible.
